message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 160 progress comment

RusticMaple: runtime_compat.rs — task::yield_now_with_cx +
unix::next_line_with_cx added. search_bridge.rs confirmed 0 real
targets after filter improvement (accept `cx: Cx` by-value as
"takes cx", not just `cx: &`). 2 runtime_compat targets deferred
(JoinSet::join_next + Command::output).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
